name: Addvalue Technologies Ltd
summary: Addvalue Technologies Ltd, an investment holding company, provides satellite-based communication and digital broadband products and solutions for connectivity between human, machines, and human and machines. It operates through three segments: Europe Middle East and Africa, North America, and Asia Pacific. The company develops and manufactures a range of terminals operating on satellite networks for land, maritime, and aeronautical applications; and develops agile communications systems and employs software defined radio and deep machine learning tools for governments and commercial enterprises. It also provides turnkey contracting services for system integration; and managed services that combine edge processing in terminals and cloud-based services platforms. The company markets its products and solutions under the Wideye brand. Addvalue Technologies Ltd has partnership with AIOT Chile SpA to provide a smart satcom-based digital IOT/M2M solution. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Singapore.
